case_title: TSANG SIU HEI VS BANKS YOLANDA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,300.00 FILED BY TSANG SIU HEI AS TO DEFENDANT BANKS YOLANDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSANG SIU HEI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BANKS YOLANDA DEFT WAS NOT THE OWNER NOR DRIVER OF CAR INVOLVED. NOTE; DEFT TOLD POLICE DEFT WAS DRIVING CAR, PLFT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SAID IT WAS A MAN DRIVING CAR.
